ground_truth.title: 🪶WindTunnels🪁 + Enemy Ai (WIP)
ground_truth.author: HakanBacn
ground_truth.main_content: The windtunnels work as anyone would expect. Make the thing go brrrr and go have fun! Our new friend has 3 attack paterns: Normal close combat (can chain up to 3 different attacks, can be blocked and parried). Ball-mode: becomes a spikey ball and wrecks havok! (bounces towards the player and moves as well mid-air, flying against a wall will break the attack and stun the enemy). Beak-charge: Charges like a bullet towards the player (when hitting a wall, it will get stuck). Remaining issues/Missing features: State transitions, Beak-charge. The Enemy ai took such a long time...but after..oh it's 2am.. after 13 hours (including the visuals), I finally have some more gameplay! wohu...Imma sleep now
with: The windtunnels work as anyone would expect. Make the thing go brrrr and go have fun!
Our new friend has 3 attack paterns:
Normal close combat (can chain up to 3 different attacks, can be blocked and parried)
Ball-mode: becomes a spikey ball and wrecks havok! (bounces towards the player and moves as well mid-air, flying against a wall will break the attack and stun the enemy)
The Enemy ai took such a long time...but after..oh it's 2am.. after 13 hours (including the visuals), I finally have some more gameplay!
